mapper.select: /* 문서별 파일 목록 조회 file.selectFileListByDocId */ SELECT A.DOC_FILE_ID , A.DOC_ID , A.FILE_NAME , A.FILE_PATH , A.FILE_SIZE , A.FILE_TYPE , A.FILE_ORD , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DOC_FILE A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DOC_ID = #{docId} ORDER BY A.DOC_FILE_ID, A.FILE_ORD

/* 문서별 파일 조회 file.selectFileByDocId */ SELECT A.DOC_FILE_ID , A.DOC_ID , A.FILE_NAME , A.FILE_PATH , A.FILE_SIZE , A.FILE_TYPE , A.FILE_ORD , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_DOC_FILE A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.DOC_ID = #{docId} AND A.DOC_FILE_ID = #{docFileId}
